telegram_message_slots.body:
Secwyn India Affiliate Launch Commissions

Commission is paid only for a qualified customer’s first successful subscription payment.

Starter
Monthly subscription: $25 commission
Annual subscription: $120 commission

Growth
Monthly subscription: $100 commission
Annual subscription: $600 commission

Scale
Monthly subscription: $300 commission
Annual subscription: $1,500 commission

Important:

• No commission is paid for views, likes, clicks or free registrations;
• All commissions are subject to attribution, qualification, refund and fraud review;
• Renewals and later plan changes do not create a second first-sale commission;
• USD is the official accounting currency;
• Approximate INR values may be displayed for reference;
• Earnings are not guaranteed.

Secwyn Affiliate Attribution Rules

Click-to-registration window:
A customer must create a Secwyn account within 30 days after a qualifying referral-link click.

First-payment window:
An attributed customer must complete their first qualifying payment within 90 days after registration.

A documented active B2B sales opportunity may receive one administrator-approved extension of up to 30 additional days.

Important:
• Renewals do not create another first-sale commission;
• Switching from monthly to annual billing does not create a second commission;
• Refunds, chargebacks, fraud and incorrect attribution may cancel or reverse commission;
• Referral attribution cannot be manually transferred without a valid review.

approved_scripts.body:
Hi [Name], I noticed your team works with outbound campaigns. Secwyn provides a second-line pre-send risk and audit layer that helps teams review higher-risk contacts before sending. It does not guarantee deliverability or inbox placement, but it provides evidence, clear decisions and recommended actions. Would a short overview be useful?

Affiliate disclosure: I may earn a commission if you purchase through my referral link.

Hi [Name], just following up once in case a short Secwyn overview would be useful for your team. No problem if this is not relevant, and I will not follow up again without your reply.

Affiliate disclosure: I may earn a commission if you purchase through my referral link.
Understood. I will not contact you again about Secwyn. Thank you for letting me know.
I do not want to give you inaccurate information. I will refer this question to the official Secwyn team.

Secwyn is a second-line pre-send risk and audit layer. Its findings can support review decisions and recommended actions, but they do not guarantee that an address exists, that a message will be delivered, or that it will reach the inbox.
Affiliate disclosure: I may earn a commission if you purchase through my link. I am an independent Secwyn affiliate, not an employee.

telegram_templates.body:
VERIFIED WIN

{{win.public_identity}} generated a qualified {{sale.plan_label}} {{sale.billing_cycle_label}} customer sale.

Base commission scheduled:
{{commission.base_display}}

Status:
Qualified and scheduled under the applicable commission review rules.

This result is not typical or guaranteed. Earnings depend on qualified customer sales.

SECWYN AFFILIATE PAYOUT UPDATE

The {{payout.month_label}} affiliate payout batch has been processed.

This batch includes commissions that completed qualification, refund and fraud review before the payout cutoff.

Please check your affiliate dashboard for your personal payout status.

For privacy and security, individual payout account details are never published in this channel.

faq_seed.a: No. This is an independent commission-only affiliate opportunity. There is no salary or guaranteed income.
No. Secwyn does not charge a joining fee and does not require a product purchase to apply.
Only after a qualified customer's first successful subscription payment, subject to attribution, refund, fraud and eligibility review.
No. Secwyn affiliates may not use cold email, automated direct messages or bulk WhatsApp or Telegram messages.

faq_seed.q: Can I earn from multiple levels?
faq_seed.a: No. Rewards are limited to one direct generation. An inviter cannot earn from the invitee's invitees.
A customer must register within 30 days of a valid referral click and normally make the first qualifying payment within 90 days after registration.
Eligible balances of at least $50 are scheduled for the monthly payout process, normally on the 28th, subject to review and account verification.
No. Secwyn provides evidence, decisions and recommended actions, but does not guarantee address existence, delivery or inbox placement.
